b300_blocked_reason: A3 produced no B240 loose candidate and no near-miss; B300 phase pull would not repair the missing 240 projection-phase anchor.

decision_tree.no_near_miss: stop LP-Hnew B240 path and reconsider LP paper positioning

run_groups.mechanism_change_from_a3: leaves the local B240 x_pair swap G80-100 O-nearby family; adds larger separations and orientation families
run_groups.geometry_knobs: gap/center separation 120-220 nm; y_pair and diag_pair; swap and noswap; J1/J2 order; wider clearance
run_groups.purpose: recover LP projection selectivity before phase tuning
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop only after 36 cases or after a strict/loose candidate is confirmed across 451/452/453
run_groups.decision_after_group: if loose or near-miss appears, focus B240 refinement; otherwise run group 2

run_groups.mechanism_change_from_a3: uses adjacent-bin phase anchors only when selectivity is better, not B240 label inheritance
run_groups.geometry_knobs: source anchors near 180/300; require ratio-filtered donors; phase pull by gap/orientation/order
run_groups.purpose: find a 240 common-phase candidate by relabeling a more selective projection family
run_groups.trigger: run after group 1 if B240 is still below near-miss
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop after any complete near-miss or loose candidate; reject phase-only hits with ratio below 2
run_groups.decision_after_group: if near-miss appears, focused B240 refinement; if not, run escape hatch

run_groups.mechanism_change_from_a3: changes fixed height after H600 mechanism families fail; still B240-only
run_groups.geometry_knobs: limited H650 versions of the best H600 mechanism families; no full six-bin or H700 sweep
run_groups.purpose: determine whether H600 is the blocker rather than the LP dimer concept
run_groups.trigger: run only if H600 groups 1 and 2 have no near-miss
run_groups.early_stop_rule: stop after 18 cases or earlier only on system error; do not expand H650 without evidence
run_groups.decision_after_group: if no near-miss, stop LP-Hnew B240 path and reconsider LP paper positioning
